name: PT Eka Sari Lorena Transport Tbk
summary: PT Eka Sari Lorena Transport Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides transportation services in Indonesia. It offers land and air transportation services; document, package, and cargo delivery services; and land transportation rental services, as well as engages in palm oil agribusiness. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Eka Sari Lorena Transport Tbk is a subsidiary of PT. Lorena Karina.
